film.title: Deadfall
film.overview: A thriller that follows two siblings who decide to fend for themselves in the wake of a botched casino heist, and their unlikely reunion during another family's Thanksgiving celebration.

dialogues.dialogue: someone doing something dirty.  Yeah, I know what you mean.  Shame.  It's all right, little sis.  It's a good sign when you feel a little bad.
The FBI Academy!  You passed the exam!  I'm so damn proud of you, honey.  Yeah.  Well, I don't know.

My dad carried me all the way back to the house.  When I got down off the podium in Beijing,  he was so f*****g proud of me.  And then later in the dressing room,  I told him I was leaving home to go pro.
If you were one of my boys,  I would hit you so f*****g hard.  If I were one of your boys, you'd be proud of me.  I want everybody the hell out of here.  All of you. You hear me?
